name: Pure Transit Technologies, Inc.
summary: Pure Transit Technologies, Inc. operates as an alternative fuel vehicle solutions provider in the United States. The company focuses on the manufacture of propane, natural gas, hydrogen, and electrical conversion kits for trucks, automobiles, and industrial equipment. It also involves in the brokerage and assistance in distribution and sale of hybrid electric, compressed natural gas, and liquid petroleum gas buses manufactured in China. The company, formerly known as AFV Solutions, Inc., was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Irvine, California.
